name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in engram
title: ''
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `engram init`
2. Run `engram capture ...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error output if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Shell: [e.g., bash 5.2, zsh 5.9]
- SQLite version: [output of `sqlite3 --version`]
- engram version: [output of `engram version`]
